title: Rum-ble In The Jungle
summary: Nothing like those subpar rum cocktails you're used to. This fruity number's made with rum and comes finished with caramelised banana strips.

method.description: To begin with, slice up both bananas into long strips — reserving two strips. Place them on a baking tray and sprinkle with sugar. Either use a blow torch or high temperature grill to caramelise the sugar on top, then leave to cool.
Mash up the remaining banana strips, and place in a pan with the sugar and water. Heat gently until the sugar is dissolved and the banana has infused the syrup.
Fill a cocktail shaker with ice and then go in with the banana syrup, triple sec, rum and pineapple juice. Shake vigorously for 10 seconds.
Double strain into a rocks glass with ice. Garnish with your caramelised banana slices and enjoy.

chefs.name: Mob
chefs.summary: Mob is on a mission to instil a love of cooking in everyone, because we believe in the positive impact that it can have on people's lives.
